title: T-077 — Reference.ApprovalChainTemplates table (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-077 — ApprovalChainTemplates table

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Reference.ApprovalChainTemplates table backing single-vs-multi approver chains for the Approval stage screen.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0077_approval_chain_templates.sql per §17.11.5 DDL: Reference.ApprovalChainTemplates(template_id TEXT, tenant_id UUID, chain_mode TEXT CHECK in 'single'|'multi', steps JSONB NOT NULL, created_at, PRIMARY KEY(tenant_id, template_id)).
2. ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + tenant_isolation policy.
3. JSONB schema validation via Zod at write-time (steps must be array of {role, order INT, required_count INT}).
4. Drizzle schema + barrel.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0077_approval_chain_templates.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/approval-chain-templates.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/approval-chain-templates.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0077 runs, when an INSERT with chain_mode='triple' is attempted, then it fails CHECK constraint per §17.11.5 'single'|'multi' enum
2. Given migration 0077 applied, when SELECT runs as tenant A and tenant B, then each only sees its own rows (RLS verified)
3. Given an INSERT with steps=[{role:'manager', order:1}] (missing required_count), when the Drizzle write runs, then Zod validation rejects with INVALID_STEPS error per §17.11.5 steps schema

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/approval-chain-templates.test.ts asserting CHECK + RLS + Zod validation before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test approval-chain-templates'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow chain_mode outside 'single'|'multi'
- Do not skip Zod validation on JSONB steps
- Do not skip RLS

pipeline_inputs.description: Create Reference.ApprovalChainTemplates table with chain_mode CHECK + JSONB steps + Zod validation + RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration emits the table per §17.11.5 DDL. Zod schema for steps JSONB. RLS enforced.
